author: Coder4
description: 粘贴抖音 / TikTok / 微信公众号 / YouTube 链接，自动转录/提取/OCR 成 Markdown 并写入 vault。单一插件覆盖多平台，输出 AI-readable 文本。 - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Coder4
manifest.description: Turn Douyin / TikTok videos, WeChat Official Account articles, and YouTube videos into clean Markdown notes via a local backend (ASR, OCR, scrape).
manifest.name: AnyContent Vault Importer

name: AnyContent Vault Importer

releases.author: vancoder4-cyber
releases.description:
Polish release — fixes the only review warning so the listing on community.obsidian.md goes from Satisfactory to Excellent.

## Changed

- **`manifest.json` description rewritten in English** so it reads naturally to the international Obsidian community. The previous Chinese description has been moved to the README intro paragraph for the local-language audience. Listing copy now:

  > Turn Douyin / TikTok videos, WeChat Official Account articles, and YouTube videos into clean Markdown notes via a local backend (ASR, OCR, scrape).

- Description now ends with an ASCII `.` instead of a Chinese `。`, clearing the only warning from the Obsidian Community directory automated review.

## Behaviour

No code changes. Same plugin you've been running — only the metadata text the directory uses for display has changed.

## Matching backend

Pair with [`anycontent-obsidian-backend@1.0.2`](https://github.com/vancoder4-cyber/anycontent-obsidian-backend/releases/tag/v1.0.2), which adds a real security fix (default bind `127.0.0.1` instead of `0.0.0.0`).

## Upgrade

BRAT users: auto-updated on next Obsidian launch (or BRAT settings → Check for updates).
Community-directory users: Obsidian will detect this release within a few minutes and re-run the review.

## Full changelog

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/vancoder4-cyber/anycontent-obsidian-importer/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).

releases.author: vancoder4-cyber
releases.description:
Patch release — fixes a regression that truncated Chinese titles containing decimal points.

## Fixed

- **Chinese title truncation** — titles like "月入7.7万美元的独立开发者" were being cut to "月入7" because the splitting regex included ASCII `.` as a sentence terminator. The regex now only splits on `。！？` and newlines (the original 1.0.x behaviour), so decimals and abbreviations in Chinese titles survive intact.

## Backend (1.0.1, separate repo)

The matching [`anycontent-obsidian-backend@1.0.1`](https://github.com/vancoder4-cyber/anycontent-obsidian-backend/releases/tag/v1.0.1) adds API-key encoding validation to the Douyin ASR path so a non-ASCII placeholder key produces a clear actionable error instead of a cryptic `'latin-1' codec can't encode characters` deep inside `urllib3`. Plugin-only users don't need to update the backend, but doing so makes future debugging much easier.

## Upgrade

BRAT auto-updates beta plugins on Obsidian launch. Or in BRAT settings → Check for updates → confirm.

No data migration needed.

## Full changelog

See [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/vancoder4-cyber/anycontent-obsidian-importer/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).

releases.author: vancoder4-cyber
releases.description:
First public release of **AnyContent Vault Importer**.

Paste a Douyin / TikTok / WeChat Official Account / YouTube link, the plugin sends it to a local backend (see [anycontent-obsidian-backend](https://github.com/vancoder4-cyber/anycontent-obsidian-backend)) that transcribes / scrapes / OCRs the content into a clean Markdown note inside your vault.

## Highlights

- Douyin / TikTok video → ASR transcript (+ optional no-watermark MP4 download)
- Douyin image post (图文) → per-image OCR
- WeChat Official Account article → full body in Markdown
- YouTube video → timestamped transcript
- Inbox folder for "drop a file, get a note" automations
- Structured YAML frontmatter (title / source / author / platform / post_type / created / tags …) so notes slot straight into Dataview or Bases

## Install (BRAT, until community store approves)

1. Install [BRAT](https://github.com/TfTHacker/obsidian42-brat) in Obsidian.
2. BRAT → "Add Beta plugin" → paste `https://github.com/vancoder4-cyber/anycontent-obsidian-importer`.
3. Enable **AnyContent Vault Importer** in Settings → Community plugins.
4. Start the backend as described in the [backend README](https://github.com/vancoder4-cyber/anycontent-obsidian-backend).

## Privacy

The plugin only ever talks to your local backend URL. No data leaves your machine via the plugin itself.
